roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION FOR RECORD CLEARANCE PC1203,4(A) MEMO IN SUPP OF P&A FILED
DEFT'S PC17(B) MOTION REDUCE TO MISD, MEMO P & A FILED

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC 17(B) MOTION/NP/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) AS TO COUNT 1, PC 245(A)4,/CTORD: CHARGE(S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR/X:ORDER REDUCING CHARGE(S) FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL: DEFENSE PC 17B PETITION/NP/CONTD: SAME, AND FOR RECEIPT OF APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/SUPP:03-28-19/S18/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CTORD:APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT SHALL INCLUDE A COPY OF THE ORIGINAL POLICE INCIDENCE REPORT, VICTIM CONTACT INFORMATION, TERMS OF PROBATION IN SAN MATEO COUNTY AND DEFENDANT'S COMPLIANCE WHILE ON PROBATION, ANY VICTIM RESTITUTION ORDERED, PAID OR STILL OWING BY DEFENDANT, AND APD RECOMMENDATION RE DEFENSE REQUESTED RELIEF/

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN MATEO COUNTY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN MATEOCOUNTY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/PROB EXP: 04-05-19/
/CAL: DEFENSE PC 17B PETITION/NP/CONTD: SAME, TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE GORDON
/CAL: DEFENSE PC17B MOTION/NP/CONTD: SAME, AND FOR DEFENSE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION
/CAL: DEFENSE PC 17B MOTION/CONTD: SAME, PER DA REQUEST, FOR ALVAREZ AND TRAN ANALYSIS AND SO THAT DA MAY CONTACT VICTIM
